CustomField.description: Accounting Method from the interest invoice
CustomField.formula: IF( OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Interest'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Deferred - Interest'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'HL/SL-Interest') ) , TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Accounting_Method__c) , IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Aircraft MR'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'HL/SL-MR'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Deferred - MR')), TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__MR_Accounting_Method__c) , IF( OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Security Deposit'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'HL/SL-SD'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Deferred - Security Deposit')), TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__SD_Accounting_Method__c),null)))
CustomField.label: _Accounting Method
